title: echium humile subsp. pycnanthum
intro: Echium humile subsp. pycnanthum, also known as small or dwarf blueweed, is a plant species in the borage family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. Echium humile subsp. pycnanthum is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
